title: Income tax returns - Canada.ca
content:
When a non-resident individual provides services through a corporation, both the corporation and the individual may be required to file a tax return.

## Topics about Income tax returns
- Individual To file, which form to use, deadline, filing late, and where to send.
- Corporation To file, which form to use, deadline, filing late, and where to send.

## Forms and publications
- International and non-resident forms and publications
